subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the Sun of Guidance! Every bounty is possible, according to capacity, worthiness and merit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستشرق از شمس هدی هر رحمتی ممکن است که باستعداد و استحقاق و لیاقت و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation, @differences in human capacity
